overall.description: Third-person survival horror gameplay footage showing a character exploring a dark wooden cabin interior with a flashlight. The character searches through rustic rooms, picks up a red gas can in a garage area, and encounters another survivor near the exit stairs. Atmospheric lighting with heavy shadows and flashlight beam illumination.

scene_state.functional_zone: rustic cabin living area with bench and hanging clothes

events.description: flashlight beam moves across wooden walls illuminating target board
character turns right toward window area and workbench

agents.ego_description: methodically searching the cabin interior with a flashlight, examining furniture and walls

entered.detail: long wooden bench with folded clothes on top
blue and dark garments hanging on wall hooks
simple wooden chair with woven seat
white sack or bag lying on the dirt floor
circular target practice board mounted on wooden wall
wooden workbench with tools and papers scattered on surface
small rectangular window with wooden frame

segments.scene_description: The character explores a dimly lit wooden cabin room with a flashlight, revealing a rustic interior featuring a wooden bench with hanging clothes, a chair, and a workbench. The flashlight beam scans across log walls and a target practice board as the character moves through the enclosed space.

scene_state.functional_zone: storage corridor with shelving and supplies

events.description: moves from main cabin room into narrower storage corridor with shelves
flashlight illuminates light switch on wooden wall

agents.ego_description: moving through tight storage corridor, examining shelves with containers and supplies

entered.detail: rustic wooden shelving unit with various containers and supplies
dark metal bucket on the floor
electrical switch mounted on log wall

segments.scene_description: The character transitions into a narrow storage corridor lined with wooden shelves holding white containers and supplies. The flashlight reveals a metal bucket on the floor and a light switch on the wall as the character squeezes through the tight wooden passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: garage workshop with generator and exit stairs

events.description: character picks up red gas can from the floor
encounters another survivor standing near the exit stairs

agents.ego_description: picking up a red gas canister and carrying it toward the wooden stairs exit

notable_agents.action: survivor standing near the stairs watching the player approach with the gas can

entered.detail: large portable generator with pull cord and fuel tank
corrugated metal garage door partially visible in darkness
wooden staircase leading upward to exit
bright red gasoline canister picked up by character
metal rack with various garage items

segments.scene_description: The character enters a darker garage area containing a generator and metal shelving, picks up a red gas canister, and walks toward wooden stairs leading out. Near the exit, another survivor stands by the metal roll-up door, creating a tense encounter in the dimly lit workshop space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through the interior of a rustic wooden cabin that transitions from a lived-in room into a cramped storage area and finally a dark garage. It begins by scanning a dimly lit room with a flashlight, illuminating a wooden bench with hanging clothes and a target practice board against log walls. As the character moves forward, the space tightens into a narrow storage corridor lined with shelves of white containers and supplies. The scene then opens into a darker garage area containing a generator and metal shelving, where the character picks up a red gas canister. Finally, the camera follows the character toward wooden stairs and a metal roll-up door, culminating in a tense encounter with another survivor.
